question: What is your return policy?
answer: We offer a 30-day return policy for all unused items in their original packaging. To initiate a return, visit your order history and select 'Return Item'. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the item.

question: How long does shipping take?
answer: Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days. Expedited shipping takes 2-3 business days. Overnight shipping is available for an additional fee and delivers the next business day. Free standard shipping is available on orders over $50.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. All transactions are secured with SSL encryption. You can also use store gift cards or promotional credits at checkout.

question: How do I create an account?
answer: Click the 'Sign Up' button in the top right corner of our website. Enter your email address, create a password, and fill in your shipping details. You can also sign up using your Google or Facebook account for faster registration.

question: How do I track my order?
answer: Once your order ships, you will receive a tracking email with a link to track your package. You can also log into your account and visit 'Order History' to see real-time tracking updates for all your orders.

question: Do you offer a warranty on products?
answer: Yes, all our products come with a 1-year manufacturer warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship. Extended warranty plans of 2 or 3 years are available for purchase at checkout. Warranty claims can be submitted through our support page.

question: How do I contact customer support?
answer: You can reach our customer support team by email at support@example.com, by phone at 1-800-555-0199 (Mon-Fri 9am-6pm EST), or through our live chat feature on the website. We typically respond to emails within 24 hours.

question: Do you offer discounts or promotions?
answer: Yes! Sign up for our newsletter to receive a 10% off welcome coupon. We also run seasonal sales, holiday promotions, and offer a loyalty rewards program where you earn points on every purchase that can be redeemed for discounts.

question: How do I find the right size?
answer: Each product page includes a detailed size guide with measurements in both inches and centimeters. We recommend measuring yourself and comparing to our size chart. If you're between sizes, we generally recommend sizing up for a more comfortable fit.

question: Can I cancel or modify my order?
answer: You can cancel or modify your order within 1 hour of placing it by visiting your order history and clicking 'Cancel Order' or 'Modify Order'. After that window, the order enters processing and changes may not be possible. Contact support for assistance with processed orders.

question: Do you ship internationally?
answer: Yes, we ship to over 50 countries worldwide. International shipping rates and delivery times vary by destination. Import duties and taxes may apply and are the responsibility of the buyer. Check our shipping page for rates to your country.

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page and enter your email address. You will receive a password reset link within a few minutes. The link expires after 24 hours. If you don't receive the email, check your spam folder or contact support.
